steps.title: Scale the given expression
steps.content: You do not need to solve for $x$. The target expression is $24x$, and $24x$ is exactly $4$ times $6x$: $$24x=4(6x).$$

steps.title: Use $6x=18$
steps.content: Substitute the given value into the scaled expression: $$24x=4(18)=72.$$ The value of $24x$ is $72$, which matches D.
